description: IMS introduction (October 2024) — preceded by repeated GSTR-2B clarification circulars

signals_at_time.description: 3 circulars on GSTR-2B static statement and ITC flow in 2022-2023
ITC matching mechanism deferred at 48th and 49th council meetings

description: Rule 37A ITC reversal for non-filing suppliers — introduced via Finance Act 2022

signals_at_time.description: Multiple circulars on ITC eligibility where suppliers hadn't filed
5+ AARs in 2021 on ITC availability despite supplier non-compliance
Budget 2022: 'measures to ensure ITC chain integrity'

description: E-invoicing threshold reduction to ₹5 crore — announced 2023

signals_at_time.description: Threshold reduction discussed at 47th council, deferred
ICAI and industry bodies repeatedly asked for phased e-invoicing expansion

description: Online gaming / casino GST at 28% on face value — October 2023

signals_at_time.description: 7+ AARs on online gaming classification in 2021-2022 with conflicting outcomes
Online gaming GOM report deferred across 49th and 50th council meetings

description: GST on corporate guarantees — clarification circular 2023

signals_at_time.description: 4 conflicting AARs on corporate guarantee valuation in FY2022-23
2 earlier circulars on related party transactions touching guarantee treatment

description: Composition scheme for service providers — did NOT change despite signals (negative case)

signals_at_time.description: ICAI asked for composition expansion for service providers for 2 consecutive years
